info.name: OFeed Server API Scenarios
info.description:
Scenario-driven REST API collection for the OFeed server.

Important notes:
- Configure at least one of fixtureQuickEventXml, fixtureMeosXml, or fixtureSiDroidXml before running the XML and competitor scenarios.
- File uploads use paths relative to apps/server/postman. For Newman use --working-dir apps/server/postman.
- validateXml defaults to false so local runs do not depend on fetching the external IOF XSD.
